prompt: Create a vibrant dark-pop anime illustration of a Cheshire-cat inspired humanoid cat girl lounging diagonally on a thick tree branch in a surreal enchanted forest at sunset. The character has one large mischievous cat head with a huge toothy grin, one visible glowing red-orange eye and one winking eye, tall pointed ears, long white whiskers, purple-and-orange striped fur, and a massive curling striped tail sweeping across the bottom of the image. She wears a gothic lolita outfit made of exactly 6 visible clothing/accessory elements: a black puff-sleeve dress, a small black bow at the collar, a white ruffled apron/skirt layer, rainbow-striped arm warmers, blue-and-white striped thigh-high stockings, and glossy black lace-up platform boots. Pose her seated on the branch with both legs extended toward the viewer for strong foreshortening, one fluffy paw-hand resting near the boots, the other arm partly hidden, creating a playful but unsettling expression. Use neon purple, orange, cyan, magenta, deep black, and warm golden sunlight with high saturation, dramatic rim lighting, glossy highlights, and sharp cel-shaded anime rendering. The background should show exactly 3 major tree branches crossing the composition, dense dark trunks and twigs, stained-glass-like multicolored leaves, and a blazing golden sun flare behind the character's head. Compose as a vertical portrait, dynamic Dutch-angle perspective, maximal detail, dark fantasy pop-art mood, luminous backlight, crisp linework, no text except an optional small artist-like signature near the lower center, no watermark, no extra characters.
